ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  "batting_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batting team */,
  "bowling_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowling team */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Current status of the match (e.g., ongoing, completed, abandoned) */,
  "umpire1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the match referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "toss_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, field) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_batting_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("batting_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_bowling_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowling_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Captain of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Coach of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "team_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Player's batting hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  "bowling_hand" TEXT /* Player's bowling hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  "player_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's image */,
  "career_batting_average" TEXT /* Player's career batting average */,
  "career_bowling_average" TEXT /* Player's career bowling average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "innings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each innings */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batting team */,
  "over" INTEGER /* Over number */,
  "ball" INTEGER /* Ball number */,
  "innings_number" INTEGER /* Number of the innings (1st, 2nd, etc.) */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the innings */,
  "wickets_fallen" INTEGER /* Number of wickets that fell in the innings */,
  "overs_bowled" TEXT /* Number of overs bowled in the innings */,
  "innings_status" TEXT /* Status of the innings (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("innings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balls" (
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ball */,
  "innings_id" INTEGER /* ID of the innings */,
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman */,
  "non_striker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the non-striker */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "batsman_runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the batsman */,
  "extra_runs" INTEGER /* Extra runs scored */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "non_boundary" INTEGER /* Whether the ball was a boundary */,
  "is_wicket" INTEGER /* Whether the ball resulted in a wicket */,
  "fielding_positions" TEXT /* JSON object or string representing the fielding positions during the ball */,
  "ball_speed" TEXT /* Speed of the ball in km/h */,
  "ball_type" TEXT /* Type of ball (e.g., off-spinner, fast, leg-spinner) */,
  "ball_angle" TEXT /* Angle of the ball in degrees */,
  "ball_length" TEXT /* Length of the ball (e.g., full, short, good) */,
  "ball_line" TEXT /* Line of the ball (e.g., straight, outside off, leg side) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ball_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("batsman_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_innings_id FOREIGN KEY ("innings_id") REFERENCES innings ("innings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_non_striker_id FOREIGN KEY ("non_striker_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dismissals" (
  "dismissal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dismissal */,
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ball */,
  "dismissal_kind" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., caught, bowled, run out) */,
  "player_dismissed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player dismissed */,
  "fielder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fielder involved in the dismissal */,
  "dismissal_time" TEXT /* Time of the dismissal during the match */,
  "over_number" INTEGER /* Over number of the dismissal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dismissal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_player_dismissed_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_dismissed_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_fielder_id FOREIGN KEY ("fielder_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_ball_id FOREIGN KEY ("ball_id") REFERENCES balls ("ball_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extras" (
  "extra_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extra */,
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ball */,
  "extra_type" TEXT /* Type of extra (e.g., wide, no ball, leg bye) */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored due to the extra */,
  "extra_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the extra (e.g., wide ball, no ball, leg bye) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extra_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extras_ball_id FOREIGN KEY ("ball_id") REFERENCES balls ("ball_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boundaries" (
  "boundary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary */,
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ball */,
  "boundary_type" TEXT /* Type of boundary (e.g., four, six) */,
  "boundary_time" TEXT /* Time of the boundary during the match */,
  "over_number" INTEGER /* Over number of the boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boundary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boundaries_ball_id FOREIGN KEY ("ball_id") REFERENCES balls ("ball_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wickets" (
  "wicket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wicket */,
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ball */,
  "wicket_type" TEXT /* Type of wicket (e.g., bowled, caught, run out) */,
  "wicket_time" TEXT /* Time of the wicket during the match */,
  "over_number" INTEGER /* Over number of the wicket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wicket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wickets_ball_id FOREIGN KEY ("ball_id") REFERENCES balls ("ball_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_matches" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_role_in_match" TEXT /* Role of the player in the match (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player in the match (e.g., playing, not playing, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_innings" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "innings_id" INTEGER /* ID of the innings */,
  "player_score" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the innings */,
  "player_balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player in the innings */,
  "player_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player in the innings */,
  "player_overs_bowled" TEXT /* Number of overs bowled by the player in the innings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "innings_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_balls" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ball */,
  "player_action" TEXT /* Action of the player during the ball (e.g., batsman, non-striker, bowler, fielder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "ball_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_matches" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the team in the match */,
  "team_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the team in the match */,
  "team_overs_bowled" TEXT /* Number of overs bowled by the team in the match */,
  "team_balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the team in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "match_id")
)
